vocab.meaning: thời gian gắn kết chất lượng
vocab.example: Car journeys were the perfect opportunity for some quality bonding time with my parents away from digital distractions.
I remember the sheer excitement every time we would embark on a journey to the countryside during the summer holidays.
I used to press my face against the window to get a panoramic view of the mountains as we drove past.
The rhythmic humming of the engine would often lull me to sleep within minutes of hitting the highway.

vocab.meaning: bừa bộn với đồ ăn nhẹ
vocab.example: The backseat was always cluttered with snacks and comic books to keep us entertained on longer hauls.
I was fascinated by how the changing scenery would unfold before my eyes as we moved from the city to the coast.
There was a distinct feeling of freedom whenever my father finally decided to hit the open road.
Reading in the car was a big mistake for me, as it invariably led to a rather nauseating experience.
The long drive always built up a massive sense of anticipation for the holiday that lay ahead.

vocab.meaning: nhớ lại một cách sống động
vocab.example: I can still vividly recall the specific smell of the car's interior during those early childhood adventures.
